title: bigelovia eryngioides
intro: Bigelovia eryngioides, also known as Western Yarrow, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Western Yarrow include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating wounds and infections due to its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties. Western Yarrow can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate specific health concerns.
